textPlain: Last month, before this result came out, the question "Is Every Convex Polyhedron Rupert?" was added as a formal Lean statement to Google's Formal Conjectures repository:https://github.com/google-deepmind/formal-conjectures/blob/1...I wonder how feasible it would be to formalize this new proof in Lean.
I could have sworn that Matt Parker did a video on this as well, but I couldn't find one.
https://youtu.be/gPIRLQZnRNk , 7:20 specifically for cubes.I knew I'd seen it before too so you nerd-sniped me.
